typecheck.details: No typecheck command configured in services.yaml

lint.details: No lint command configured in services.yaml

nonBlockingIssues.description: cascade_stats.py _is_chain_complete uses detection.id.split('_')[0] to extract primitive name, which fails for order_block ('ob' prefix) and liquidity_sweep ('sweep' prefix). Currently masked by empty upstream_refs and structural fallback.
O(n²) divergence index building in comparison.py — precompute set unions before loop.
test_detections_per_day_mean asserts '> 0' instead of exact expected value 2.0.
VAL-WF-009 (River adapter multi-month) has no test in walk-forward's own test file, covered by cross-area integration test VAL-XA-002.
Private function _filter_bars_by_date imported from runner.py — cross-module private API coupling.
Population std (N) used instead of sample std (N-1) — consistent internally, but undocumented choice.
Schema 4B params field always empty {} when generated via serialize_evaluation_run — Phase 3 consumers will get no param data.
Redundant sanitization: RAJSONEncoder._sanitize() and _deep_sanitize() implement nearly identical type conversion, both run sequentially.
Double progress printing in cmd_sweep — _build_1d_grid() prints progress, then cmd_sweep replays it.
Unused imports: time, copy, extract_sweep_combos in eval.py.
eval.py compare subcommand only supports single config — no actual pairwise comparison generated.
VAL-XA-007 partial: test uses 6-month data yielding 3 windows, not the 12-month range required for ≥6 windows per validation contract.
PHASE1_TEST_FILES list hardcoded in test_integration.py duplicates services.yaml test_phase1_only — maintenance risk.
Hardcoded 9784 detection count assertion couples test to specific baseline data — acceptable as regression test.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note under Coding Conventions documenting that detection ID prefixes don't always match dep_graph primitive names: order_block uses 'ob' prefix, liquidity_sweep uses 'sweep'/'sweep_cont'/'sweep_delayed'. Code extracting primitive name from detection IDs via split('_')[0] must use a mapping dict (e.g., {'ob': 'order_block', 'sweep': 'liquidity_sweep', 'sweep_cont': 'liquidity_sweep', 'sweep_delayed': 'liquidity_sweep'}).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: comparison-statistics review found cascade_stats.py line 266 extracts primitive name via detection.id.split('_')[0], which yields 'ob' instead of 'order_block'. src/ra/detectors/order_block.py:252 uses make_detection_id(primitive='ob'), src/ra/detectors/liquidity_sweep.py uses 'sweep'/'sweep_cont'/'sweep_delayed'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to test naming conventions: 'Integration test files may use test_integration*.py prefix for cross-area tests.' Currently only test_evaluation_, test_river_, test_output_, test_cli_ prefixes are documented, but the feature spec for cross-area-integration required test_integration.py.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-area-integration review: AGENTS.md Test conventions lists only 4 prefixes. Feature description explicitly required 'Create tests/test_integration.py'. Worker correctly followed feature spec over AGENTS.md convention.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'When cross-module utility functions are needed (e.g., _filter_bars_by_date), prefer making them public in a shared utils module rather than importing private functions across modules.' Walk-forward imports _filter_bars_by_date from runner.py, creating a fragile cross-module dependency.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: walk-forward-validation review: src/ra/evaluation/walk_forward.py:13 imports private _filter_bars_by_date from runner.py.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note under Output schema conformance: 'Schema 4B params field is currently always empty ({}) in serialize_evaluation_run. Phase 3 consumers should not depend on this field for actual parameter data until it is populated.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: structured-output-and-cli review: src/ra/output/json_export.py:380 passes params={} with TODO comment. Schema 4B specification shows params should contain actual parameter values.

rejectedObservations.observation: No typecheck or lint commands configured in services.yaml
rejectedObservations.reason: Already known — services.yaml has empty strings for typecheck and lint. Not this milestone's scope to add tooling.

rejectedObservations.observation: Upstream_refs are empty in Phase 1 detectors — skill should mention this
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in comparison-statistics handoff discoveredIssues. Skill feedback channel, not shared state.

rejectedObservations.observation: Inline import pattern in eval.py for CLI lazy loading
rejectedObservations.reason: Style choice localized to one file, not systemic. Reasonable for CLI startup performance.
Operational knowledge. Tests correctly run expensive cascade operations. Not a convention issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed skill correctly for cross-area integration
rejectedObservations.reason: Procedural note confirming procedure was followed. No action needed.
